$validatedAgainst: container:dimensions.width (% and calc) — the flex-split lever
container:font is a no-op (none set on these structural containers)
container:customStyle.flex is inert (sizing is via dimensions.width only)
$notes: Splits are a single 'container' with display:flex + flexDirection:row + gap — NEVER the 'columns' component.
Main fills via width 'calc(100% - 348px)' (rail 332 + gap 16); rail is a fixed 332px with matching min/maxWidth.
Tablet/mobile collapse BOTH children to width:'100%' (overlay handles this) so the rail stacks under the main.
Outer flexWrap is 'nowrap' on desktop; the rail container is itself display:flex flexDirection:column gap:16 to stack its cards.
$slots.main fills the main column (e.g. primary card + datalist); $slots.rail fills the rail column (e.g. detail/meta cards).
Generalized from the live vdd-claude bodySplit/container42/detailRail; live form used a messy 75%/25% calc — this block uses the CLEAN fixed idiom.
